description: Call Control provides phone spam detection and call-blocking services using a crowdsourced complaint database and user preference controls. Its platform helps carriers and applications identify suspicious callers and decide whether to allow, block, or route calls to voicemail.
summary: CallControl exposes a single REST HTTP API at `https://api.callcontrol.com` for spam-number reputation lookup, call-blocking decisions, user preference management, and spam reporting, authenticated with a Call Control API key.
